\tzpentry{ID5742}{Helix Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5742 introduces Helix Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \phi_{helix} = \frac{2\pi}{\lambda}(z_2-z_1)\tan\alpha_{helix} \end{equation}
